title: [Deprecated] Low-effort London Underground 2024 Stock
description: This pack adds the London Underground 2024 Stock via Minecraft Transit Railway, but low-effort. (REPLACED BY SKYWALKER_6517'S 2024 STOCK!)
body: (DISCONTINUED AND DEPRECATED, REPLACED BY SKYWALKER_6517'S 2024 STOCK) The train was highly requested to be added to the mod, but since no one made, i made by myself as a 1996 Stock retexture for Minecraft Transit Railway mod, it's low effort but i did my best to make it.
